purpose: CLI argument parser for wrapper-level flags (windowing, exit behavior, cursor) and passthrough of unknown flags to MatrixArgs; also defines AppOptions and WindowMode.
invariants: Unknown flags are passed through to passthroughArgs rather than rejected
gotchas: NormalizeKey replaces underscores with hyphens so --exit_on_esc and --exit-on-esc are equivalent
--monitor N consumes the next token as the index value and switches mode to BorderlessSingleMonitor; invalid values fall through to passthrough
The --single-monitor flag leaves monitorIndex=null (primary monitor), not index 0
